comment: EduSphere literally transformed my career. The React track is better than my entire 4-year university curriculum! The premium UI detail and direct code walkthroughs got me hired in 3 months.
The Figma systems course is brilliant. In-depth explanations of variable mapping that I haven't found in any other video tutorials online. Highly recommend!
Marcus Chen's startup financial course is a cheat-code. I was able to model our Seed Round Cap Table in one afternoon. Our lead VCs were highly impressed by the model clarity.
